programs.title: Secrets in the Ice
programs.desc: Archaeologists in Russia unearth many mass graves; a World War II American military plane on a Canadian mountain; strange cosmic rays coming from Antarctica's ice; in Russia, researchers investigate a phenomenon involving glowing snow.

programs.title: Mysteries of the Ancient Dead
programs.desc: To ensure body and spirit remain everlasting, the ancient Egyptians developed elaborate rituals, massive tombs, and even magic incantations to entomb their remains; when laying bodies to rest, the Romans were all about processional pomp and grandeur.

programs.title: A Cold War of Spies
programs.desc: The desire to spy behind enemy lines leads to the development of some of the world's most sophisticated reconnaissance technologies; the United States finds a way into Soviet airspace through overflights of their top-secret stealth plane, the U-2.

programs.title: How I Got Here
programs.sub_title: Ghana: That Name That You Live
programs.desc: Doris takes her daughter, Shetin, to Ghana to learn the truth behind her royal bloodline.

programs.title: Fishing for History
programs.sub_title: If You Sink It, They Will Come
programs.desc: When historically low water levels in Texas begin to reveal intentionally sunken ships from World War One, Justin and Mike take a trip to the Lone Star State. What they find is a mystery that predates the war and sends Toban to a local museum for help.

programs.title: Oracles & Prophets
programs.sub_title: Kingdom of Cults, Presidents Death, Sacred Chickens
programs.desc: A prophecy born on a mountainside ignites the ambitions of a controversial figure, an eerie prediction of inclement weather launches a woman into the spotlight, and the fate of empires hangs in the balance as Romans await the pecks of chickens.
